rule_metadata.author: Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Suspicious Command Line Indicating BlackCat Execution with Get UUID Option

rules.rule_text:
title: Suspicious Command Line Indicating BlackCat Execution with Get UUID Option
id: 76fe5991-2bff-4ae2-adcf-28a95788027f
status: experimental
description: Detects process execution with the --access-token flag accompanied by
  a child process with a 'get uuid' option.
references:
- https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/security/blog/2022/06/13/the-many-lives-of-blackcat-ransomware/
author: Micah Babinski
date: 2022/12/04
tags:
- attack.execution
- attack.t1059
- attack.t1204
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    ParentCommandLine|contains: --access-token
    CommandLine|contains: get uuid
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: high
